{{Quote|I can't believe you're not taking my deeply personal battle experiences seriously. It all happened just as I told you.|Starter|<ref name="Starter's Tale">{{JournalCite|4|Starter's Tale}}</ref>}}
'''Starter''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Defense Fleet]]. He was also loosely affiliated with the [[Black Curs]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] gang, and flew a [[T-65B X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65B X-wing]] that had been modified and customized.

==Biography==
{{Quote|It seems obvious that your story has completely divorced itself from any semblance of reality.|[[Tru'eb Cholakk]]|<ref name="Starter's Tale" />}}
Starter was the son of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] and a former attendee of the [[Corulag Academy]]. He was eventually expelled from the academy for being undisciplined and generally obnoxious and decided to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] instead as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] pilot. He proved to be a skilled X-wing pilot, and a loyal ally who was always willing to lend a hand in a [[Starfighter combat/Legends|space battle]].

While a skilled pilot, Starter was primarily known for his outrageous tall tales about his own heroic deeds and his general past. Among other things, he claimed to have grown up on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], was a friend of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]], and that he learned about starship piloting from [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. Another claim of his was that he made the [[Kessel Run/Legends|Kessel Run]] in less than seven [[Parsec/Legends|parsecs]], thus beating Solo's record with no less than five parsecs. He also claimed to have killed [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]], [[IG-88 assassin droid/Legends|IG-88]], [[Boddu Bocck]], [[Beylyssa]], [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]], [[4-LOM/Legends|4-LOM]], [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]], and [[Zardra]] single-handedly, as well as having stolen [[Tydirium/Legends|''Tydirium'']] and humiliated [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] in the process by locking him in his own [[Meditation chamber/Legends|meditation chamber]].
